comment_text:
Welcome to Episode 2!

Before we get started, we want to say thank you.

We read every single comment from Episode 1. Every suggestion, every concern, every compliment, and every word of encouragement. Your passion for BattleBots is exactly why this sport has endured for so many years, and we appreciate everyone who took the time to share their thoughts.

BattleBots Pro League is being created for all of our fans, those who have been with us for years and those discovering robot combat for the first time. Many of your ideas have already been discussed by our team, and as production allows, you’ll begin seeing refinements throughout the season, starting with Episode 2.

Most importantly, thank you for supporting the incredible builders, teams, sponsors and robots that make BattleBots what it is. Their passion inspires everything we do. 

Now let’s talk about tonight’s competition!

Which fight was your favorite?

Which robot impressed you the most?

Who’s your early pick to win the Pro League Championship?

Enjoy Episode 2!
Scorpios needs to be more front heavy or at least have a wedge that does not allow to 'slip under'. Makes it particularly vulnerable on the less protected underbelly.
Didn't know Tap-outs were allowed 😂😂
No riptide or ripperoni is upsetting
Wow, those fights were… Unfortunate.
The most envied kid in school.
RIBBOT!!!
You nailed the pace, this was so much better that episode one 🤘

with Faruq's voice: Better be kind to your smart fridge, if you don't want to get shot with ice cubes during the AI uprising. 
And when your roomba is chasing you with a kitchen knife,
you know...it's time...for...BATTLE BOTS!!!
Thank you..BrightData
Chris aged 10 yrs. overnight

That young man at 9 years old has an advantage over everyone. Everybody is going to help him in little ways like showing him up close what he destroyed and being his age everyone wants to see him learn and more his age get into this

OH YEAH, THE CAT KING IS BACK! Honestly one of my favorite teams to watch, I love Martin Mason's energy.
Again, just ads for what is trapped behind a paywall. SKIP. Worst short term malfunctions shown & not too many of those; maybe 3.
I'm almost in tears! I MISSED YOU GUYS!
Crazy how far Tombstone has fallen
Good to see more robot carnage, keep it going
Enjoyed the editing in this one a lot more that ep1. Personally I'd like to see the pace dropped about 20%, and that'll be the sweet spot between build up and run time.
Who actually likes this version of battle bots more then how it used to always be?😢
If you’re gonna reuse footage with all of your old talent, I really do. Hope you are considering compensating them for using that footage. Otherwise, please bring back that talent.
Could we have a French audio track?
Man that's the saddest I've ever seen Copperhead. The bot has good defence though, that's a plus!
Much better but still too short!
The commentary sounds so different. And the editing of the fights is very off. Please just make it like the TV show. Simple!
Good Job

Unfortunately, tombstone without wheel cover. 
Hope next i can see the new tombstone. 

Succes for Ray and team.
can you let a bit more time on the different groups ? It's a bit fast on those moments. Great episode tho, thumbs up :)

I'll echo the people who say including spoiler-y hits in the montage portions is no good. I actively skip parts of videos that do that. Not exactly what you want when you're going for minutes watched on this platform.
Much better editing, thanks for listening
That was great. Thanks to everyone involved!
The fight against Copperhead and joker was pathetic
Well.. things can only get better I guess. 😅
Wohooo 🎉

This episode is certainly better than the previous one, but the pace is far too fast still. Previous seasons had more continuity and far fewer cuts, that editing style really allowed you to kind of immerse into the show. This content really doesn't hit the same when you don't have the time to just observe and analyze what is going on

I can't believe I'm saying this, but I want a ton more of team interviews, video of the big room where everyone works on their bots, and video of just Chris and Kenny talking about the bots, the matchups, being back together, etc. I understand you want to have as much content as possible -- makes sense -- and you could have even more episodes and/or longer episodes if you included all of this extra stuff. I used to not like how much of this kind of content was included in your previous TV seasons, but now I understand why it was there. These first two episodes feel too short and hyper edited; it would be great to have a more natural feel with all the video I mentioned above. Thanks for bringing BattleBots back!

I don't know if I was use to the old production like it was on TV or even the last couple tournaments I watched on MAX, or if it was genuinely better. But I'm not fond of fast paced editing personally. Also, someone mention spoiling the fights in the teasers beginning and end of the episodes, and their right. Spoiling big hits or match changing hits destroys the hype for me.💛
Why no match box sound???? It is ruining experience
tombstone got absolutely owned

The dude helming MadCatter has an unreal charisma stat. Dude is a walking promo and has an absurdly infections positive level of hype to him.
I see the lad, and I am EXCITED. Such a cool guy. Seriously. Absolute S-tier character.,
NO MUSIC IN THE BACKGROUND OF FIGHTS PLEASE
Why is a kid driving copperhead? Could there not be a minimum level of driver and robot in pro league?
The Jungle music during the fights is a bit weird, just a nitpick.
Loved this episode, even thought tombstone and skorpios didnt get a chance to shine. Maybe next time.
From a threat to a treat, tomstone
What will happen if tombstone and manta went full weapon to weapon?
Manta Now Having A Records of 19-1 Is Just INSANE, And His Winning Streaks Are 18, While Bite Force Are 19, Let's See If The 19 Streaks Record Will Be Broken Or Not!
hasil editan terbaru dan hasil nya masih belum memuasakan... kenapa gak kembali ke tema edusi2 sebelum nya?????

Gotta give props to the team for instantly improving the editing based on the overwhelming feedback. I was expecting that the first handful of episodes would have been done and dusted, so I wasn't expecting to see changes until partway through the season, but you addressed a lot of it immediately. Still improvements that could be made (personally I just want more of the behind-the-scenes, and probably cut out showing big parts of the next matches), but this is significantly more watchable. 

Bit of a heartbreaker to see new Tombstone unable to even compete. I was watching Ray's vlogs prior to the event and was pretty excited to see what he had cooked up. Glad he has a backup plan though, and I guess this'll be the bittersweet last hurrah for the old 'bot.

I HATE THE NEW PRODUCTION. THE EDITING IS ANNOYING, BECAUSE IT'S RECORDED AND THEN EDITED LATER INSTEAD OF BEING A BIT MORE LIVE-RECORDING LIKE A SPORTS PROGRAMME. IT'S REALLY ANNOYING TO WATCH, MY EYES HURT, FROM THE POST-PRODUCTION FAKE ZOOM AND PANS BLAH BLAH BLAH. SO ANNOYING

I was never the biggest tombstone fan but it's always sad to see someone who has achieved as much as ray billings and the rest of the tombstone team lose so easily, that being said mad catter looked great, I'm also looking forward to seeing what manta does going forward they looked good despite there short match
It's a real shame the new version of Tombstone couldn't compete. That was the one everyone was really looking forward to.
Madcatter is my fave.
TAPOUT?!? Since when did BattleBots have a tapout??  Some of the lower levels, sure, but I've never seen it at this level.
Im back to the old seasons where everything has much excitement not like here. Im so upset 😞
Put in padding and back support at the arena, i went a few years ago and it was tough.
The bots look good but a lot of rust on these teams and it shows.  You can tell is been awhile since they fought last.
that kid‘s driving skill is a joke😂
20:00 for everybody saying that tombstone should retire, click on this time stamp
Seizure warning still needed 😢
Editing still is garbage. Just edit it like a tv episode. Like discovery.

More forgiving if you hit something and easier to flip back.
3 fights a week is ridiculous
Man it's like watching robot wars.  Every robot just dies on its own.
Better, but still too choppy. Faruq is rushed. Keep getting better!

Please do not post clips from the fights at the beginning of the ep or at the end. I don’t need spoilers going into the ep or for next week’s ep. For next week, just tell us who is fighting for next week and that’s it! Also, PLEASE DITCH THE MUSIC DURING THE FIGHTS! I just want to hear the bots and the commentary like the old tv eps. If I wanted to listen to music.. I would listen to music. Overall, much better, but still needs work. Fights this week were really disappointing and the Skorpios/Manta fight could’ve literally been a short. Hopefully next week has some more exciting fights.
Big improvement in editing!
All yakspin, almost no fight   USehSlop

You learn skills and compete. You test your creativity without limits.
It’s amazing to see their intelligence, curiosity and determination to be the best!  
This young man will be among our finest. He might be inventing your new flying wheelchair. 
He is learning what it feels like to reap the benefits of his hard work. I am so proud of James!
3 of the lamest fights ever recorded. All 3rd grade level

I really love the new format and I’m glad you found a way to keep up the faster pace and still make a lot of the people who didn’t like the editing on episode 1 happy. Please don’t cut the music or extend the episodes with filler as some are suggesting.

Only thing I think you need to put back is Faruq’s intro. Without “Ladies and gentlemen, are you ready?” then “It’s robot fightin’ time!” doesn’t hit as hard. You need the full 15-second build-up and anticipation.

Yup, this is still unwatchable. The camerawork and editing is hyperactive in the goofiest, most meaningless way - as if this was slapped together by someone who doesn't understand BattleBots and what makes it fascinating. Aside from the tacky pacing and style choices, you need to create CONTEXT: place, characters, stakes, tension, story. Respectfully, BattleBots needs to hire professionals with a background in live sports and/or documentary.
Best strategy against tombstone: Be patient and let it destroy itself
Really not a big fan of the spoilers at the beginning and end of these new episodes
Where are the slow motion of the fights 😢 it really is very fast
Where are the judges?
That 9-year-olds gonna remember that moment.The rest of his life! 👏

Quality wise this episode is an improvement from the first episode (Still not the best but is an improvement). Good to see the old version of Tombstone again. Not good to see them losing. Seems the wheel locked up. Tombstone managed to take off a Madcatter wheel so they had a slight chance. Good strategy and driving by Madcatter to target the back.
Tombstone should retire now.

Still only 22 mins? Still cut like a fever dream,
Audio and video quality seems improved to episode 1, but still completely ungrounded with very little time to actually connect with any of it.

So much zooming and shaking, put a strobe warning, it's so intense. maybe if you did a little less zooming and shaking with teh graphics you'd have time for some more meaningful interviews. Just make hard cuts. you do not need all that extra shake. it's just jarring and adds nothing to the production. If you are going to use it, use it occasionally and for emphasis.  It's so jarring...

I wish they just take the best bots instead of going for storylines

I enjoyed both episodes so far, but it still feels a bit rushed to me...like I'm watching on 1.5 speed or something. I get it's YouTube, but this audience is already used to a longer format. I'm not saying take it back to the previous runtime (and I'm not saying don't), I'm just saying don't be afraid to include some more details and make if feel closer to how it used to be.
What a great show!!!  Keep it up.
While the editing could still use some work it is a lot better then episode one.
Jackpot caved in under no pressure

If anyone wants to look deeper into any of these robots, check out how Manta did in the Robogames event. That is a seriously dominant robot and I was shocked to hear that the main builder is as young as he is. This bot could seriously shake up the field.
Great improvement over last episode in terms of editing! Love that BB listens to the fans.
my biggest complaint so far is that the episodes should be longer I’d say 40-45 minutes at least other than that i’m loving Battle Bots again 🤘🏼
What terrible camera work and cuts…each fight seems more like a promo vid than an actual match.  FAIL

Then ray and martin team up to create mortician and katkong, and now Madcatter gets its revenge

Most boring episode since they did the small  boring series named takeouts or smth

Was hoping to see the new Tombstone today, but looks like we gotta wait.
This is the pro league and we have this garbage going on at 5:15. this is not the time to be learning how to drive. tyhis is sposed to be the PRO league. Come on
I’m pretty sure Tombstone’s the new Free Shipping
Editing was MUCH better. Please let us hear the audio during the fights though. I WANNA HEAR THE HITS AND THE CROWD
Maybe letting the 9 year old drive the bot wasn't the smartest decision. But hey, it's their robot.

Great improvement in production. 
I think what the new series is missing most of all is some dramatic fights. This is no-one's fault and part of the competition. It is a bit unfortunate though.

I think there is still perhaps too much focus on making this like the televised competition. I think it would be interesting to see the event from a more typical youtuber styled production. That is a bit more of a raw, gonzo style. I think it could be worth reaching out to a few big youtubers that may be interested in participating and collaborating. I think if you had Mark Rober or Cleetus Mcfarland (just examples, not speaking for anyone's interest or availability) enter a team it would be big boost for the new format. They could do their own videos too.

Bottom line, we need to see some sparks fly! I'm sure we will. Keep up the great work and thank you for listening BB team. We all want the same thing and I hope you succeed.

i hope theres more behind the scenes. robot testing and repair ""filler"" or some extra bonus videos. growing up i loved watching the robot and car destruction. as an adult, i still love it, but i also love seeing all the, out of the box on the fly brain storming. on how the heck to fix X damage in, not enough time. permitted it can happen without impeding the actual repair speed of said robots of course
Thanks for letting the fights breathe
Thank you guys so much for not doing nearly as many camera cuts. It looks so much better. Not sure how I feel about the new tapping out, but we'll see.
This show became just a shadow of what it used to be. 😒👎
Adhd editing in effect again lol.

I know you might not have the most camera angles but please milk those hits both in slo mo replays and full speed. Flo mo so you see what happens and full speed to understand the impact. That 1 punch ko could have been more impressive.

I also I wanna say I really like that sequence with Ray and Martin, at the start asking if Ray needs a push. 
Keeping that stuff in the show is a A+ for me. Just great team building

Definite improvement over episode 1, so kudos to that. It still feels like there's just not enough meat to these episodes. It's like you just start getting into it and they're over. I don't know if that means there should be 4 fights or to just include more of everything. I'd say make them minimum 30 minutes
Stop spoiling the upcoming fights!  Also drop the music during the fights.
Always nice to see more teams bribing their kids for the battles.
Please make the minimum age to drive 10. And then next year make it 11. Whatever it takes to get that kid off the controls.
Poor tombstone. Took the L with an old model. That had to sting.
you just have to love team scorpios. such kind words. one of the reasons i love this sport so freaking much.
These Eps could be 20 minutes longer, hopefully next year if this is still a thing you go with more bots.
there is still too much cutting away and bad editing.
Better 👍
I think less talking and more fights. I understand the whole, "drama," portion of the show, but I just want fights :) Like NHRL
Shame that Tombstone had technical issues, that we didn’t get to see it wearing it’s Fluffy armour. Funnily enough with Madcatter, in this iteration it looks like Beta with a vertical spinner.
Incredible production shame the fights werent great, happens sometimes tho
Where can I send money? I dont need more merch just more content :DDD
So glad Battle bots is back! Some big upsets in the first 2 episodes
camera work still jerky and amateurish.      editing better but not up to battlebots standards.

Wasted episode, its old tombstone not the massively improved with the guards! ,smaller and with more power. i can't understand why it didn't start, i want to see the new tombstone not the old build we have seen that for years its totally outdated, it had no chance. Manta is good but its just so predictable these days, like all these robots are the same, vertical drums and disc, bite force clones, reduce the max spin for verticals bring back diversity again, the "verts "have taken over and ruined robot combat!
Better editing, but these fights today were underwhelming, and that's no ones fault. Hopefully, these later fights will be more entertaining

As it is right now, the editing has improved a lot. It's a lot less speedy, has more behind the scenes footage and sharper image quality on most shots. Surely this could be improved and we're all eager for that. It's a bit unfortunate that they didn't mention why Copperhead is under a new ownership. Then there's a surprise tap out? So now you can no longer say "This is Battlebots, there's no tapping out.". I cannot wait for the next episode to be released.
Good to see you still on air.

As a Copperhead fan I was sweating in that first match after their weapon exploded on the upper deck. No clue what kind of divine intervention led to Jackpot’s weapon breaking, but the kid did take advantage of it pretty well and if he gets more practice and they make the weapon less brittle, they still got this!

As for the video itself, the editing is a big improvment in my opinion, and the lighting seems to be a bit better too, but I’m still not personally huge on the music during the fights. Still, I applaud the positive changes.
Mad Catter vs. Tombstone was actually a decent fight, but it just underscores that traditional horizontal spinners aren’t very competitive in the current meta.
I hate the mentioning of the clock with the start of every fight please just let our eyes move to the clock and see the logo not having the "CoreWeave" clock mentioned at the start of each fight
thanks for the improvements! in my opinion, just remove the music in the fights and make the audio quality better, if possible :)
THATS MY BOI MAD CATTER GETTING HIS REVENGE AFTER SIX YEARS IN THE MAKING!!!
What a disappointment all around on these fights. 😢 I was pretty stoked for this lineup too. Fingers crossed for better in the future.
21:14 Ribbot hybrid Riptide?! Really?!
Yes way better! ty
This was class! Keep up the good work :)

Episode flowed nicely this time, gj

Just tone down the spoilers please, or use old footage for hype

The better editing of this episode (less jarring cuts, more time given to the builders) and the addition of the tap-out makes this such an improvement over the previous one. Fantastic work on making the presentation so much cleaner, especially given that the actual fights themselves weren't as jam-packed as most of us expected!
19:14 "When your GOAT is low-key washed"
Good stuff! So happy this is back!!!!
What happened to episode one?

30 MINUTES TO FIX UP A ROBOT???


No wonder most people bought about 3 robots.
What would be the downside of posting a 45 minute episode, more in the lines of how battlebots was edited before?
Feel like showing clips of upcoming fights is no bueno. It gives away so much. We are nerds we will go frame by frame.
That was a series of brutal matches and bad luck. Thumbed it.
Another epic episode! And always great to see the sportmanship of the teams involved, as showcased well this episode.
The mad catter guy needs to drink less coffee
Not a fan of postponing a fight because your bot is not ready to fight. That should still be a disqualification.

Finally..
I miss Farooq..!
Long live Farooq...!
🔥🔥🔥
Tap out??? TAP OUT????? I DIDN'T KNEW THESE EXIST

Editing feels a lot better this time... Wasn't expecting to see changes this quickly. Good job!
Might want to turn down the music a bit during the fights, though.
Awesome to see Battlebots continue!!!!!
Battlebots have a tapout system now!? I like it. It's about time...I just wished they EXPLAINED it before it randomly popped up during a fight 😅

All 3 fights were very surprising from Copperhead's weapon breaking, to Skorpios dying due to a loose wire, and Tombstone having to run the ld bot. Hoping for some better fights next week, still yet to see a fight last more than a minute with both bots still with a functional weapon.

Please don't have music during fights as hearing the arena sounds makes the fights more engaging. I jave to look away at the start and end of the episode to avoid spoilers of fights as things can be inferred sometimes form what is shown. Perhaps show something from fights in previous tournaments when announcing who is coming next week and not clips of big hits etc. 

Thank you again Battlebots for putting this together and for listening to all the feedback from the fans.
Thanks for the editting please use more of behind the scenes and practice footage! Those are sooooo cool and interesting! Y’all can easily make these 30 minutes or longer… we will watch
I actually laughed when Jackpot pulled a Fusion and burst on fire out of nowhere lol

Jackpots fight was disappointing I thought it'd be full of huge hits.  Skorpios wasn't expecting that short of a fight. I thought tombstone was going to win that nice surprise hope the New Tombstone is ready for the next fight.
Massive thanks for uploading great episode can’t wait for the next one👌
Manta didn't even had to try against skorpios
From 0:25 to 0:30 I counted NINE cuts ROFL

I LOVE BattleBots. However, I do not love the terrible loud music while the fight is playing! 
We are NOT here for the music. We ARE here for the BOTS and the CARNAGE! 😊

Please get rid of seriously tone down the music. 

NO ONE WANTS OR LIKES IT!!!
Love this. Thanks for uploading

Love seeing the teams interact before/after fights. Pacing during fights is still a little frenetic and zoomed in (wide shots in previous seasons were great), but as a whole a great improvement in production! Thank you for listening to, and more significantly, acting to adjust the show in response to fans' critiques of the first episode! THANK YOU!!!!
Just got started and was over :(  I need more!!!
Rare dub, company listening to the customers. Editing is still fast, but watchable this time. Why can’t we have a longer episode? The TV show had more breathing time.

Man, I'm really not a fan of all our comments on the like Reddit and YouTube getting scrapped by some data collection firm to create a really incorrect looking prediction on who we think would win a fight. Seems like a waste of everyone's time and resources
Shots are waaaaay better, audio is still a little bit hit or miss but doable. Scenes have a lot more time to breath and I don't feel like I'm on aderall

Can you make it more clear with the thumbnails and descriptions which videos are actually new full pro league episodes?   You have a 02 graphic in this episodes thumbnail but you don’t even have a 01 in the first episode.   You upload quite a few videos, so they’re all mixed up when viewing your battle bots page via Apple TV YouTube app which defaults to the “For You” section at the top.   Might even want to add the S0xE0x description in that main titles as well.
I wish the editing was like the old editing / the episode length was longer. I've been really looking forward to this, feel like it's a proper let down
that first fight HAS to be re-edited, its ruined the way it is now and that kids debut is spoiled because of this editing
The editing is better. My autism went away, mostly.

This episode confirmed for me that all the same potential for this show is still there. Excited to see things be honed in! If I had to make a few notes:

1. Continue to let moments and the cuts between breath a bit more, you'll know when its good.
2. Keep more zoomed out shots of the box during fights.
3. Behind the scenes shots from the pits are always beneficial! The teams themselves have grown on me just as much as the bots over the years.

One question: Is the count out rule back to requiring controled movement? I saw that Tombstone was being counted out when 1 wheel was still working.

The potential of this show is insane. Love seeing how the teams improve year after year. The culmination of season 7 actually had me getting emotional seeing just how much the veteran teams have improved over the years. Looking forwards to more!!!

There are a lot of comments about "Tapouts". I have no problem with that. Your robot is a huge investment. It's sitting there immobile and/or on fire. Save as much of it as you can. Then fight another day.

Just a thought regarding the editing style trying to target a new YouTube audience vs that remembered from the long time fans... 

Would a dual format with a pay per view for those of us who want to purchase longer and less rushed episodes with more content be an option? I'd very happily put $5-10 down an episode if it enabled how long episodes in the format I remember and love!

The editing is much better this episode, it's nice to see some longer sections of content before switching angles. PLS Keep the audio from inside the battle box pure, we want to hear the bangs an motors spinning ( no music ). Give some footage after the fights it's nice to see the damage and cause of issues like shown in this episode. Keep up the good work, great to see battle bots back in action !!!
Thats some crazy work to hype new design so much just for bot not to work...
Bro did you guys put limits on the weapons speeds or something?? These fights seem less... something. Idk

Such upsets... I'm okay with this.

Like - I'm a die-hard, Witch Doctor fan forever, but... With how good this crop is? I'm okay with any winner (as long as it's a new champion)
The solution to the lethal spinner robots is to cover yourself up with layers and layers and layers of nylon mesh. It will clog up the spinning weapon and motor.
I don't like the echo of the voices
I just wish they did not show so many potinetal spoilers in the "Next Time"
As long as Battlebots exist, I hope Ray will continue to be the grim reaper that you absolutely have to prepare for. Wish it was new Tombstone though.
Can’t wait for the semis to be 4 riptide clones with the same battle music for every fight, the riptide meta is breaking the game lowkey
Turn on captions at 4:00

Please remove the music during the fight. I (we) want to hear the fight.
Also why the changes there?
So great that you got Chris, Kenny and Faruq back.
That's the only thing I've been missing.
Why not keep the editing the same?

9 year old really didn't drive very well, he just got lucky that Jackpot's weapon stopped working and Copperhead had a much stronger drive. He also killed his own weapon and took way too long getting off the upper deck.
I say on behalf of everyone: thank you BattleBots for listening to our feedback. We all very much appreciate it.

Oh baby, we are so back. Not every week can be bangers as far as fights go and that’s okay. Still a blast to watch. Thanks for taking feedback seriously, we wanna see this sport continue to grow and excel and this is the pinnacle of it!
Thank you for making the editing slightly better, but turn down the music during fights!!! It’s so loud

I know it would be more work, but -- you could release different edits for each ep: one for folks who just want the action, and a more comprehensive edit with e.g., pit scenes, judge deliberations, more/longer interviews, etc.
I am glad they have added the tap out
Good Job James❤❤❤🎉🎉🎉
I’m so happy battlebots is back! I love this show so much. Keep up the amazing work.
I hope Ray can get the new Tombstone working. I want to see what it can do!
James - your excitement is absolutely beautiful. Never lose your passion.
So so so much better than ep 1, thank you so much Battlebots!! The music is still a little over-the-top, and the camera angles are still a little close, but overall such a remarkable improvement!
Now Tombstone has new name firestone
20 minutes of waffle and 2 minutes of fighting.
I don’t think tapping out should be an option. It should be a fight till the clock runs out or a ko
BOOM💥❤
This is what we came for, seeing Toombstone better and stronger!
Maybe a C- for editing and production.
The editing is much better, shame none of the fights were any good. Not the productions fault though, at least they tried.

Even though it is sad to see Tombstone go up in flames, it's common sense that when you cut into a battery box, it is gonna go up, because that's the nature of it. The sportsmanship before and after the fight makes it worth it. We got some pretty decently sized hits. Honestly, I don't care if people say Tombstone is outdated anymore. It's a fan favorite, one of the most entertaining bots to watch win or lose, and it's effect on the sport is unmatched compared to any other bot. 

I really do feel like Ray is more to have fun more than anything else at this point. And I don't blame him. He's a great guy who wants tk have fun
BEST SHOW IS BACK! YEAAAAH

Thanks once again for bringing this back to us, Bright Data. This week, the editing was slightly better but felt far too rushed. We want more player interviews, more pits talk, a longer intro, more Kenny and Chris trash-talking, less seizure-inducing editing and don't put music over the fights. Also, I have to close my eyes at the start, as spoilers are a big no-no and totally unnecessary; this isn't YT Shorts, although it feels like it. However, I am absolutely delighted to see it back on our screens when so many said it would never happen; what did they know, lol? Looking forward to next Thursday's 20-minute segment.

Strange fights overall; Jackpot tapped out ( new rules 🤔 ); Skorpios stopped कार्यरत in the very first exchange; the new version of Tombstone also failed, although at least it made it into the fight instead of being unable to compete.

It was great to see the old Tombstone return after so many years, but also disappointing to watch it get knocked out so easily; in its prime, Tombstone ( old version ) was the robot everyone feared, always delivering incredible fights or completely shredding its opponents. 

Now it seems to stop working after only a few hits; still, considering how old it is & that Ray returned to drive after many years, it held up reasonably well; at least it was not a one-hit knockout; hopefully, the new Tombstone performs much better in its next match & lasts longer.

It still did some damage to MaDCatTer & destroyed its back wheel in just a handful of hits; that's how much power the old one still has.

Golden Fury 🇮🇳, Tombstone 🇺🇸, & HUGE 🇺🇸 are the robots I am rooting for to win, or at least make it close; I thought Scorpio's wedge would get underneath Manta, but it was not ground level at all; it was bulged upward; the moment I noticed that, I already expected Skorpios to lose.

A few thoughts.
I still do not think this style of editing is right for Battlebots. It makes things feel both overproduced and underproduced, and at times is hard to follow. I also still take issue with the audio mixing, and the fact there's music blaring over the fights, which themselves can barely be heard.
However, This is a clear improvement over the first episode. Most issues I have with it aren't nearly as bad as they were in that first showing. Going forward, I'd personally like to see more team stratagey talk, more setup for each individual battle, less frequent cuts and constant flashing effects, and just a more consistent feel skinned to what the show and even the episodes of Faceoffs had on offer. I think its great to see Battlebots listening to the feedback they're reviving, and I hope this episode is the start of an uphill climb for the Pro Leauge series.
I think the battles would be better without the music
